title: CT5 legal branch run — Local-to-global bookkeeping
description: Concrete schema for one legal execution branch of CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping). A conforming run may use only CT5 node IDs and records, must start at an entry node, follow declared transitions with repetition only on declared loops, align every proof record with its visited node ID, and finish with a matching outcome.

tacticId.description: Required discriminator for a branch execution of CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping); must equal "CT5".

visitedNodeIds.description: Required execution-order path for one actual CT5 (Local-to-global bookkeeping) branch. Every item must be a concrete ID from CT5.N01 through CT5.N18; the first must be an entry node, adjacent IDs must follow a declared CT5 transition, and repeats are allowed only on a declared loop.

nodeRecords.description: Required discharge records aligned position-for-position with visitedNodeIds for this CT5 run. The array must have the same length as visitedNodeIds; every item must match one concrete CT5 node-record schema and its nodeId must equal the corresponding visited ID.

x-semanticValidationRules: validate visitedNodeIds as a path in the corresponding tactic transition graph
